sentences.target: Je vais à l'hôpital cet après-midi.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vɛ a lopital sɛt apʁɛ midi/

translations.fr: Je vais à l'hôpital cet après-midi.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vɛ a lopital sɛt apʁɛ midi/
translations.en: I'm going to the hospital this afternoon.
translations.de: Ich gehe heute Nachmittag ins Krankenhaus.
translations.ru: Сегодня днём я поеду в больницу.
translations.he: אני אלך לבית החולים אחר הצהריים.
translations.vi: Chiều nay tôi đi bệnh viện.
translations.ar: سأذهب إلى المستشفى بعد ظهر اليوم.
translations.nl: Ik ga vanmiddag naar het ziekenhuis.
translations.uk: Я піду до лікарні сьогодні по обіді.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj po południu idę do szpitala.
translations.el: Σήμερα το απόγευμα πάω στο νοσοκομείο.
translations.nb: Jeg skal til sykehuset i ettermiddag.
translations.id: Sore ini saya akan pergi ke rumah sakit.
translations.sv: I eftermiddag ska jag till sjukhuset.
translations.da: I eftermiddag skal jeg på hospitalet.
translations.ja: 今日の午後、病院に行きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'aller'. Main verb of motion.
Simple preposition marking destination/goal.
Noun 'hôpital' with elided definite article 'l'' before vowel (from 'le'). Object of the preposition 'à'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular before vowel-initial word.
Compound noun meaning 'afternoon', used as a time adjunct.

sentences.target: Tu connais l'hôpital près de la gare.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ lopital pʁɛ də la ɡaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu connais l'hôpital près de la gare.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ lopital pʁɛ də la ɡaʁ/
translations.en: You know the hospital near the station.
translations.es: Conoces el hospital cerca de la estación.
translations.de: Du kennst das Krankenhaus in der Nähe des Bahnhofs.
translations.ko: 너는 역 근처에 있는 병원을 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道车站附近的那家医院。
translations.yue: 你識火車站附近嗰間醫院。
translations.pt: Você conhece o hospital perto da estação.
translations.he: אתה מכיר את בית החולים ליד התחנה.
translations.vi: Bạn biết bệnh viện gần nhà ga.
translations.ar: أنت تعرف المستشفى القريب من المحطة.
translations.nl: Je kent het ziekenhuis bij het station.
translations.hi: तुम स्टेशन के पास वाले अस्पताल को जानते हो.
translations.el: Ξέρεις το νοσοκομείο κοντά στον σταθμό.
translations.id: Kamu tahu rumah sakit dekat stasiun.
translations.sv: Du känner till sjukhuset nära stationen.
translations.ja: 駅の近くの病院を知っています。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular informal subject pronoun.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'connaître' (to know/be familiar with). Takes a direct object.
Noun with elided definite article 'l'' before vowel. Direct object of 'connais'.
Adverb forming a complex preposition 'près de' meaning 'near'.
Preposition completing 'près de' to mark proximity.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing 'gare'.
Common noun meaning 'train station'; complement of the preposition 'de'.

sentences.target: On attend devant l'hôpital depuis une heure.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ dəvɑ̃ lopital dəpɥi yn œʁ/

translations.fr: On attend devant l'hôpital depuis une heure.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ atɑ̃ dəvɑ̃ lopital dəpɥi yn œʁ/
translations.en: We are waiting in front of the hospital for an hour.
translations.es: Estamos esperando frente al hospital desde hace una hora.
translations.de: Wir warten seit einer Stunde vor dem Krankenhaus.
translations.ko: 우리는 병원 앞에서 한 시간째 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在医院门口等了一个小时了。
translations.yue: 我哋喺醫院門口等咗一個鐘頭。
translations.ru: Мы ждём перед больницей уже час.
translations.pt: Estamos esperando em frente ao hospital há uma hora.
translations.he: אנחנו מחכים מול בית החולים כבר שעה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã đợi trước bệnh viện được một giờ rồi.
translations.nl: We wachten al een uur voor het ziekenhuis.
translations.uk: Ми чекаємо перед лікарнею вже годину.
translations.hu: Egy órája várunk a kórház előtt.
translations.hi: हम अस्पताल के सामने एक घंटे से इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Περιμένουμε μπροστά από το νοσοκομείο εδώ και μία ώρα.
translations.nb: Vi har ventet foran sykehuset i en time.
translations.id: Kami sudah menunggu di depan rumah sakit selama satu jam.
translations.sv: Vi har väntat framför sjukhuset i en timme.
translations.ro: Așteptăm în fața spitalului de o oră.
translations.da: Vi har ventet foran hospitalet i en time.
translations.fi: Olemme odottaneet sairaalan edessä jo tunnin.
translations.ja: 私たちは病院の前で1時間待っています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun meaning 'one' or colloquial 'we'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'attendre' (to wait).
Preposition indicating location ahead of something.
Noun with elided definite article 'l''; object of the preposition 'devant'.
Preposition marking duration starting in the past and continuing to the present.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, agreeing with 'heure'.
Noun meaning 'hour'; complement of 'depuis'.

sentences.target: Les hôpitaux sont pleins en ce moment.
sentences.reading: /le zopito sɔ̃ plɛ̃ ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/

translations.fr: Les hôpitaux sont pleins en ce moment.
translations.ipa: /le zopito sɔ̃ plɛ̃ ɑ̃ sə mɔmɑ̃/
translations.es: Los hospitales están llenos ahora mismo.
translations.it: Gli ospedali sono pieni in questo momento.
translations.vi: Các bệnh viện hiện đang đầy.
translations.el: Τα νοσοκομεία είναι γεμάτα αυτή τη στιγμή.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural, introducing 'hôpitaux'.
Plural form of the noun 'hôpital'; sentence subject.
Auxiliary/copular verb 'être', present indicative 3rd person plural, linking subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, masculine plural agreeing with 'hôpitaux'.
Preposition introducing a time expression.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'moment'.
Noun meaning 'moment; time'; object of the preposition 'en'.

Les hôpitaux sont pleins en ce moment.
